reviews.name: 홍****
reviews.content: 솜이의 최애 바스락 인형 토끼입니다! 소리도 누르면 나는지 몰랐는데 이 소리도 좋아해요 ㅋㅋㅋ 토끼귀를 앙하고 잘무는데 산지 한달도 넘었는데 꾸준히 잘 갖고 놀아요! 넘귀! 다음엔 코끼리를 살까봐요~~ 보통 솜이놀아줄때 토끼귀를 갖고 터그놀이를 한답니다 ㅎㅎㅎㅎ진짜너무귀여워요
reviews.content_en: Somi's favorite crinkly toy rabbit! 🐰 I didn't even know there was a sound when you press it, but she loves that sound too lol She loves chewing on the rabbit's ears and plays with it constantly—it's been over a month and she still plays with it so well! So cute! I'm thinking about getting the elephant next~~ When I play with Somi, we usually do tug-of-war with the rabbit's ears hehe It's seriously so adorable 🥰

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
저희 강아지 첫 장난감이 토끼였거든요 !! 
너무너무 좋아해서 몇 번이나 꿰매줄 정도로 애착 인형이었는데
이제 토끼가 호빵맨이 돼버려서 ㅋㅋㅋ다시 사주려고 들어왔다가 모든 칭구들을 다 델꾸왔어요 🤎🤍🩶
이제 호빵맨 토끼는 찬밥 됐습니당 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ

저희 강아지는 바스락에 환장하는 강아지라
토끼 귀가 길고 팔락팔락해서 젤 좋아하구
다음은 코끼리 귀를 좋아해용!!
강아지는 물고 뜯을 게 별로 없어서 그런지 팬티 벗기는걸 좋아하네여,,ㅋㅋㅋ

암튼 하나같이 다 귀여운 칭구들이에요 🤎🤍🩶
reviews.content_en:
This rabbit was our pup's very first toy!! 🐰 She loved it SO much that I had to sew it back together multiple times—it was her comfort toy. Now the rabbit has turned into Anpanman lol 😅 I came to buy another one but ended up bringing home ALL the friends! 🤎🤍🩶 Now Anpanman rabbit is yesterday's news lol 😂

Our pup is obsessed with crinkly toys, so she loves that the rabbit's ears are long and fluttery. Next up, she's into the elephant ears!! Our dog doesn't have much else to chew and tug, so she loves pulling the pants off hehe 😆

Anyway, all of them are SO cute! 🤎🤍🩶

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 인형, 장난감이라면 세상 제일 좋아하는 우리집 둘째 우유인데 애착인형 하나쯤 있었음 좋겠다 생각하던때에 이렇게나 귀여운 애착인형이라면.. 무조건 구매 해야겠다 싶어서 구매했는데 바잇미 장난감 답게 그냥 만든게 아니라 몸에서 삑삑 소리도 나고 귀에서 바스락 바스락 소리가 나요 ( ˃̣̣̥᷄⌓˂̣̣̥᷅ ) 사실 크기만 컸다면 제가 안고 자고 싶어요..♥︎ 첫째는 인형 안 좋아하는데 혹시 좋아할까 싶어서 코끼리로 재구매 하려구요!!!! 젤리곰 색별로 구매해서 본가 댕댕이 선물 해줬을때 진짜 잘 가지고 놀았거든요 바잇미 장난감은 사랑입니다♥︎♥︎
reviews.content_en: Our second pup Yuyu absolutely loves anything toy or plushie, and I've been wanting her to have a comfort toy. When I saw how adorable these were, I just HAD to buy one! 💕 As expected from a BITE ME toy, it's not just any toy—it has a squeaky sound in the body AND crinkly sounds from the ears! ( ˃̣̣̥᷄⌓˂̣̣̥᷅ ) Honestly, if it were bigger, I'd want to cuddle and sleep with it myself..♥︎ Our first pup doesn't usually like plushies, but I'm reordering the elephant just in case! We bought the Jelly Bears in different colors and gave them to the dogs at my parents' house—they played with them so well! BITE ME toys are love ♥︎♥︎

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 하루종일 함께 하는 거 같아요! 요즘 최애 인형이에요 ㅎㅎ 다른 인형들이 안 놀아준다고 슬퍼할 거 같아요 ㅎㅎ 귀에서 바스락 소리가 나서 더 좋아하는 거 같아요~~ 가끔 물고와서 터그 놀이 하자고 그래서 인형이 터질까 걱정되는데 터지지도 않고 튼큰하네요!!! 너무 좋아해주니 사줄 맛도 생기고 너무 기뻐용
reviews.content_en: Seems like they're together all day long! It's his favorite toy these days hehe 😊 I feel like the other toys would get sad if he didn't play with them hehe 😂 He seems to love it even more because of the crinkly sounds from the ears~~ Sometimes he brings it to me wanting to play tug-of-war, so I worry the toy might rip, but it doesn't tear at all—it's super durable!!! He loves it so much that it makes me happy to buy him toys 🥰

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 강아지한테도 애착인형이 있을까 싶었는데 잘 때도, 외출할 때도 케이지 속에 꼭꼭 데려가는(?) 코끼리 ㅎㅎㅎ 귀여워요 ! 코끼리 귀에서 바스락 거리는 소리도 나고, 코랑 발 깨무느라 정신없는 멈머 ㅎㅎㅎㅎㅎ 망가지면(?) 무조건 또 살거에요 !!
reviews.content_en: I was curious if dogs could have comfort toys too, and turns out—yes! The elephant gets tucked into the crate with him when he sleeps and even when we go out 😊 So cute! The elephant's ears make crinkly sounds and he's always busy chewing on the nose and paws hehehe 😆 If it breaks, I'm definitely buying another one!! 🐘

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 애기가 진짜 좋아해요~ 엄청 열심히 가지고 놀다가 뻗어서 잠드네요! 다른 인형들도 사줘야겠어요
reviews.content_en: My baby absolutely loves it~~ He plays with it so hard that he just passes out and falls asleep! 😴 I should get him the other toys too!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 저희 집 댕댕이가 정말 좋아해요 귀에서는 빠스락 몸통은 삑삑이 빤스는 노즈워크까지,, 아이디어가 대박입니다 근데 인형 자체도 너무 귀여워서 제꺼 따로 소장하고 싶을 정도,,🤍 처음 택배 왔을 때부터 엄청 좋아하면서 달려들더니 계속 데리고 놀고 있네요! 특히 코끼리 코가 물기 아주 좋아요 만족입니다 ㅎㅎ 강아지 토끼도 너무 귀여워서 결국 다 살 것 같아요 😭
reviews.content_en: Our pup really loves it! The ears crinkle, the body squeaks, and even the pants work as a nose work game—the idea is genius! 🤩 The toy itself is so cute that I kind of want to keep one for myself too 🤍 From the moment the package arrived, he was crazy about it and just keeps playing with it! He especially loves chewing on the elephant's trunk. Very satisfied! ✨ The dog and rabbit are so adorable that I think I'll end up buying them all 😭

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
코끼리 너무 귀여워서 구매했어요 
원래 쓰던 인형이 터지고 좀 단단한 인형만 남았었는데 
물기 불편해 해서 말랑한 인형 찾고 있었어요 

저는 인형 고를 때 
1. 물기 쉽게 말랑한가
2. 사이즈는 적당한가 
3. 내구성이 괜찮은가
4. 계속 씹을만큼 튀어나온 부분이 있는가 
를 고려하는데요, 

1. 엄청 부드럽고 말랑하다는 말은 상세페이지에 없었지만 
리뷰 보니까 귀에 바스락 소리도 다른 인형들 보다 살짝만 건드려도 크게 나고 강아지들이 좋아하길래 (제 눈에도 너무 귀여워서 ㅎㅎ) 구매했어요 그런데 전에 쓰던 인형보다 훨씬 말랑해서 물기도 편하고 잘 놀아요!! 

2. 4-5키로 말티푸인데 사이즈 딱 적당해요 ㅎㅎ 

3. 일주일정도 됐는데 아직 터진 부분은 없어요

4. 이가 간지러운지 한 뷰분을 오래 씹고 있어서 고려하는 점인데요, 코끼리 귀, 코, 손, 발 등 많아서 좋아효

5. 그리고 노즈워크 돼서 더더 좋아요 ㅎㅎ 

만족 대만족~
reviews.content_en:
I bought the elephant because it's so cute! 🐘 My pup's old toy ripped, and all that was left were some hard toys. He seemed uncomfortable chewing those, so I was looking for something softer.

When I pick toys, I consider:
1. Is it soft and easy to bite?
2. Is the size right?
3. Is the durability good?
4. Are there textured parts to keep chewing?

1. It wasn't mentioned on the product page that it was super soft, but from the reviews, I saw that the ears make crinkly sounds louder than other toys even with a light touch, and dogs love it (plus it's so cute to me! hehe). I bought it and it's MUCH softer than my previous toy—easy to chew and he plays with it great!!

2. My pup is a 4-5kg Maltipoo and the size is just right! hehe

3. It's only been about a week and there are no rips yet.

4. Since my pup seems to have teething issues and chews on one spot for a while, I look for toys with multiple textured areas. This elephant has ears, trunk, hands, and feet—lots of places to chew! 👍

5. Plus it works as a nose work toy, which makes it even better! hehe

Very satisfied, more than satisfied~

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
코끼리는 집에 온지 하루만에 침범벅이 됐습니댜..
원래 바스락 거리는 장난감 좋아하는 아이라 귀 부분 바스락 거리면 너무 좋아해요 ㅎㅎ 너무 잘 가지고 놀아서 침범벅 코끼리 자주 빨아줘야 하지만 만족해요!! (사실 제가 코끼리 인형 가지고 싶은 마음에 산것도 한 20%는 구매 이유에 포함된답니다...^^)
reviews.content_en: The elephant became drool-covered within a day of coming home 😅 My pup originally loves crinkly toys, so she goes crazy for the crinkly ears! hehe She plays with it so much that I have to wash the drool off the elephant often, but I'm satisfied!! (Honestly, like 20% of the reason I bought it is because I wanted to have the elephant toy myself too... hehe 😊)

reviews.name: 예****
reviews.content:
매우 좋아해요 특히 코부분!!!
열흘만에 코끼리는 코를 잃었습니다 ㅠㅠ 
급히 코와 입을 맹그러주었어요 
조금 더 가지고 놀수있겠네요
reviews.content_en:
I really love it, especially the nose part!!! 😍
But the elephant lost its nose after just 10 days 😭 I quickly stitched the nose and mouth back on. At least we can play with it a bit longer now!

reviews.name: 해****
reviews.content:
저는 옷안에 캣닢넣고 캣닢인형으로 썼어요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ
강아지는 제꺼고 토끼는 고양이들껍니다 ㅋㅋㅋ
캣닢을 다시팩에넣고 그걸 다시 토끼인형 팬틔쏙으로,,,,
애들 침따문에 하얀팬틔가 초록초럭이 되었지만 그래도 넘 기엽습니당
reviews.content_en: I put catnip inside the clothes and used it as a catnip toy lol 😂 The puppy is mine and the rabbit is for my cats lol 😂 I put the catnip back in the refill pack and then stuffed it into the rabbit toy's pants pocket,,,, but because of the kids' drool, the white pants turned green lol but it's still so cute 🥰

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 뭔가 20C 초딩때 문구점에서 팔았던 귀여움ㅎㅎㅎ 토끼랑 강아지 인형 구매했는데 처음에 토끼 바지속에 간식넣어 줬더니 바지 다 찢어서 간식 빼 먹더니 요령이 생겼는지 두번째 강아지 인형은 바지 잘 벗겨서 간식 잘 빼 먹었네요ㅎㅎㅎ 바지만 따로 판매 해주면 좋겠다는 생각이 급 들었어요 원단이 얇아서 수선이 힘든 케이스라ㅜ 인형 자체만으로도 바스락 소리나서 놀기에도 좋은 장난감이지만 뭔가 노즈워킹까지 되면 더 좋잖아요ㅎㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: It has this cute vibe from the early 2000s stationery shops haha 😄 I bought both the rabbit and puppy plushes, and when I first put treats in the rabbit's pants, it ripped them apart to get the treats haha 😂 But it seems like it got smarter because the second time with the puppy plush, it took off the pants really carefully and ate the treats nicely 😆 I suddenly thought it would be nice if they sold the pants separately because the fabric is thin and it's hard to repair 😭 The plush itself makes a crinkly sound so it's a good toy to play with, but it would be even better if it could do nose work too, right? 😄

reviews.name: 진****
reviews.content: 사실 제가 더 탐나지만 잘노는 우리강아지를 위해 특별히 양보하기로 했습니다...
reviews.content_en: Honestly I wanted it more myself, but I decided to let my pup have it as a special treat since it plays so well... 🐶

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 토끼 너무 기여운거 아니냐구요 🐰🤍🤍 애착인형 되겠어요
reviews.content_en: Isn't the rabbit just too adorable?? 🐰🤍🤍 It's gonna become an attachment toy! 💕

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
ㅜㅜ 너무 귀여워요 🐰🐰
지금 강쥐랑 토끼인형이랑 베프 먹었어요 💗
중형견 키우시는 분들은 아시겠지만 진짜 장난감이 5분을 못버티고 생을 마감하는데 토끼인형은 아직 귀정도만 떨어지고 멀쩡히 살아있답니다 ^____^
짱 튼튼 이빨을 이겨낸 기특토끼인형이에요 🤍

추천합니당
reviews.content_en: It's so cute 🐰🐰 My pup and the rabbit plush are now best friends 💗 If you have a medium-sized dog, you know that toys literally don't survive 5 minutes, but this rabbit plush is still going strong with only the ears a bit torn! ^____^ It's such a tough little bunny plush that survived my pup's mighty teeth 🤍 I highly recommend it! 👍

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 요즘 제일 좋아하는 인형이에요!! 다른 인형들은 바스락거리는 소리가 조금 작아서 강아지가 반응을 잘 안했는데 바스락거리는 소리도 크고 삑삑이도 잘되서 더 잘 노는것 같아요..! 무엇보다 디자인이 너무 귀엽답니다 ㅜㅜ
reviews.content_en: It's my pup's favorite plush right now!! Other plushes have quieter crinkly sounds so my dog didn't respond as much, but this one has a louder crinkle and the squeaker works really well so my pup plays with it even more! 😄 And the design is just so cute ㅜㅜ

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
너무 잘 가지고 놀아요~~
애착 장난감이 되었습니다 ㅠㅠㅠ
토끼도 같이 구매했는데 전 개인적으로 강즤가 너모 귀여워용ㅎ
바잇미 장난감은 튼튼해서 더 좋네요~
reviews.content_en: My pup loves playing with it so much~~ It's become an attachment toy for sure ㅠㅠㅠ I also bought the rabbit, but personally I think the puppy is super cute hehe 😊 BITE ME toys are durable which makes them even better~

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 너무너무너무 귀여워용 ㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠ 그리고 잘 가지고 놀아요 막 물어뜯고 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ바지 속에 간식 숨겨 넣어주면 잘 찾아먹기도 하고 그냥..... 너무....귀엽네요 ⸝⸝ʚ̴̶̷̆ ̯ʚ̴̶̷̆⸝⸝
reviews.content_en: It's way too adorable ㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠ and my pup plays with it so well, just biting and shaking it around lol 😂 When I hide treats in the pants, my pup finds them and eats them, and just..... it's so..... cute ⸝⸝ʚ̴̶̷̆ ̯ʚ̴̶̷̆⸝⸝

reviews.name: 문****
reviews.content:
재구매♥♥
코끼리 토끼 하나씩 있는데 너무귀여워요 ㅠㅠ 토끼가 바스락거리는 귀부분이 커서 더 유용할것 같은데
엄청 고민하다가 소장용으로 코끼리 샀어요❤🫥
귀가 좀 짝짝이지만 넘나 귀여운 인형^^
바잇미 장난감은 정말 안사기 힘들어요 ㅠㅠ
집에 있는 장난감은 다 바잇미꺼😉
장난감바구니도 바잇미😉
reviews.content_en: Repurchase ♥♥ I have one elephant and one rabbit and they're both so cute ㅠㅠ The rabbit's crinkly ear part is bigger so it seems more useful, but after a lot of consideration I bought the elephant as a collectible ❤🫥 The ears are a bit mismatched but it's so adorable^^ BITE ME toys are seriously hard to resist buying ㅠㅠ All my toys at home are BITE ME 😉 Even my toy basket is BITE ME 😉

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
장난감 뭐 사주지 하다가 똭!!!!! 눈에 띈 토끼 
너무 귀엽잖아요 ㅠㅠ
이건 제 사심 백프로에요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ
울 애기도 좋아해서 뿌듯해요
귓부분 바스락 소리나니까 관심 가지고
삑삑 소리도 나니까 엄청 좋아라해요 !!
다른것두 구매 하고싶어요
reviews.content_en: I was wondering what toy to get when suddenly—BOOM!!!!! The rabbit caught my eye ✨ It's seriously so cute ㅠㅠ This is 100% my personal taste hehe 😋 I'm so proud because my baby likes it too 🥰 The crinkly ear part gets attention and the squeaker sound works great so my pup loves it so much!! 💕 I want to buy more! 🛍️

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
재질이 너무 부드러워요!
코코가 가지고 놀기 사이즈도 적당해서 좋아요~
제가 소장용으로 하나 더 구매 하고 싶은 만큼 너무 너무 귀엽습니다😊
바지도 따로 세탁 가능 할 수 있게 분리 가능하더라구요~
이런 섬세함 너무 감동,,🥹
reviews.content_en: The material is so soft! 😊 Coco loves playing with it and the size is just right~ I want to buy one more just to keep, it's so incredibly cute! The pants are detachable so they can be washed separately too~ This kind of attention to detail is just touching,,🥹

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 워낙 장난감 좋아하는 애기라서 장난감을 종종 사주곤 하는데 바시락 거리는 재질이 없더라구여! 그래서 노즈워크랑 바시락 삑삑이까지 겸비한 장난감을 찾아보다 넘 기여워서 산 코끼리…🐘 너무 귀오워서 제가 가지고 싶네요… 우리 아가도 처음부터 미쳐날뛰어서 만족하는 거 같네욤 ☺️🩶🩶
reviews.content_en: My pup loves toys so much that I buy them often, but I couldn't find one with that crinkly material! So I went looking for a toy that combines nose work, crinkly sounds, AND squeakers... and I found this adorable elephant 🐘 It's so cute I want it myself... Our baby went crazy over it from day one so I think she's very happy ☺️🩶🩶

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content:
우리 강아지 토끼오자말자 토끼빤쮸벗겨버림ㅜㅜㅜㅜ
다시 토끼빤쮸입히는게 더힘듬ㅠㅠ
두마리서 토끼귀  양쪽으로 싸우고 난리
만간 한마리 더 입양해줘야할듯
토끼너무 귀여워서 나도 가지고싶은 인형임
reviews.content_en: Our dog got the rabbit toy and immediately ripped off the pants ㅜㅜㅜㅜ It's even harder to put the rabbit pants back on ㅠㅠ The two of them are fighting over the rabbit ears from both sides and causing chaos. Honestly I think we need to adopt one more. The rabbit is so cute I want to keep the plush for myself too.

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content:
너무 귀여워요 ㅠㅠ 매번 고민만 하다가 드디어 구매해봅니다 ,,
저희 강쥐는 강아지가 어울렸는데 제 사심 담아 ... 토끼로 샀어요 귀에 바스락 거리는 소리도 하고 삑삑이 까지 있어서
너무 잘 가지고 놀아요 ~~ 팬티 벗기면서 노는 갱쥐들 귀여웠는데 저희 애기는 팬티는 건들지 않네요 ㅋㅋㅋ 애착인형이 되기를 기다리고 있어요 !!?
reviews.content_en: It's so cute ㅠㅠ I've been hesitant for so long but finally decided to buy it,, My pup would've looked good in the dog, but I added my own preference... and got the rabbit instead! The ears make a crinkly sound and it even has a squeaker so my pup plays with it so well~~ Other dogs play with ripping off the pants but mine doesn't touch them haha So cute! I'm waiting for it to become a comfort toy!!?

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 우리 둘째 사줄려고 구매했어요. 토끼가 제일 귀여워서 토끼로 구매했는데, 처음 온 날부터 한 달이 지난 지금까지 끼고 살아요ㅋㅋ 귀찢어지는 날까지 달고살듯 싶습니당. 귀여운 애가 귀여운 인형을 물고있는게 보기만 해도 힐링됩니다..
reviews.content_en: I bought this for my second dog. I chose the rabbit because it's the cutest, and from the day it arrived until now, a month later, my pup carries it around constantly lol It's so healing to watch how my cute baby holds such a cute plush toy in its mouth... I feel like it'll be attached to those ears until they tear.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
장난감 구입하면 2시간도 안되서 다 부셔버리는 저희집 귀요미 갱얼쥐,, 바잇미 장난감만 유일하게 하루 이상 가서 항상 오프라인으로만 구입하다 이번에 온라인으로 왕창 구입 했습니다.
하루에 하나씩 개봉 할 예정입니다
오늘은 코가 삐뚤어지게 토끼를 사냥하고 있네요,,ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: My adorable pup destroys toys in less than 2 hours, but BITE ME toys are the only ones that last more than a day so I always bought them offline... but this time I bought a bunch online. I'm planning to open one a day. Today my pup is on a rabbit hunting spree with a crooked nose lol

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 저희집 강쥐가 파괴신이라 일주일에 한 번은 인형 장난감을 찢어버리는데(산 지 하루만에 찢어버린 장난감도 한트럭 ㅠ) 바잇미 장난감들은 아직 한 번도 찢어진 적이 없어요!(처음 강아지 입양산 20년 5월에 샀던 바잇미 장난감을 아직도 잘 가지고 놀아요 ㅎㅎ) 아니 잘 찢어지지도 않는데 예쁘기 까지? 그건 못 참지.. 코끼리도 살까말까 고민하다가 결국 살 건데 고민해서 뭘하나 하고 두개 구매했는데 ㅠㅠ 진짜 사길 잘할 것 같아요 너무 귀엽고 바스락과 삑삑이 두마리 세마리 토끼를 잡은 장난감이 단 돈 8,900원?? 물론 페이코 할인까지 받아 야무지게 샀지만 너무너무 잘 산 것 같아요 ㅠㅠ이름 그 대로 어딜가든 애착인형처럼 잘 들고 다니고 그걸 보는 저는 귀여워서 쓰러짐 ㅠ 진짜 엄마랑 아빠, 할머니 추석때 본 친척들까지 모두 귀엽다고 강쥐랑 인형 사진찍어갔어요 후 ㅠ 정말 최고!
reviews.content_en: My pup is a destruction god and tears up plush toys once a week (I have a whole truckload of toys that got ripped just a day after buying them ㅠ) but BITE ME toys have never been torn even once! (I still play with the BITE ME toy I bought back in May 2020 when I first adopted my puppy hehe) Plus they don't tear easily AND they're pretty? I can't resist... I was debating whether to get the elephant too, but in the end I just bought two without thinking ㅠㅠ I think this was such a good purchase. So cute and for a toy with crinkle and squeaker and two or three rabbits combined for just 8,900 won?? Of course I got an extra discount with Payco but I really think I made an amazing purchase ㅠㅠ Just like the name, it becomes an attachment toy that my pup carries everywhere and watching that makes me melt from cuteness ㅠ Even mom and dad, grandma, and relatives we saw at Chuseok all took photos of my pup with the plush saying it was so cute! Seriously the best!

reviews.name: 창****
reviews.content:
너무 귀여워요💛💛
망가지지말고 우리 아가랑 오래오래 같이해줘🐘🩶
reviews.content_en: So cute 💛💛 Please don't break and stay with our baby for a long long time 🐘🩶

reviews.content:
장모치와와 둘과 함께 살아요♡
콩이는(베이지컬러) 8년동안 애착인형이 있음.
그 인형을 가장 좋아해서 이참에 바꿔주려고 구매.
크기는 제가 생각 했던거 보다는 작아요.
그치만 넘 귀엽네요ㅎ
귀는 바스락,배는 삑삑이 
콩이는 며칠동안 한두번 물어보고 말았고
아리는 관심도 없었...ㅜㅜ
둘다 인형을 좋아해서 잘 가지고 놀줄 알았는데 시큰둥 하네요
다행히 콩이는 그전보다는 잘 물고 놀지만
아리는 바스락 소리 때문인지 싫어하네요

애착인형이 되었으면 하는 마음으로 구매했지만 아가들은 걍 그런가봐요
reviews.content_en: I live with two long-haired Chihuahuas♡ Kongyi (beige color) has had an attachment toy for 8 years. Since she loves that toy the most, I bought this one hoping to switch it out. The size is smaller than I expected. But it's so cute hehe The ears crinkle and the belly squeaks. Kongyi only chewed on it once or twice over a few days and Ari didn't seem interested at all...ㅜㅜ I thought they both liked plushes and would play with it well but they seem pretty indifferent. At least Kongyi plays with it better than before but Ari doesn't like it, maybe because of the crinkly sound? I bought it hoping it would become an attachment toy but I guess that's just how it is with puppies.

reviews.content:
장모치와와 둘과 함께 살아요♡
콩이는(베이지컬러) 8년동안 애착인형이 있음.
그 인형을 가장 좋아해서 이참에 바꿔주려고 구매.
크기는 제가 생각 했던거 보다는 작아요.
그치만 넘 귀엽네요ㅎ
귀는 바스락,배는 삑삑이 
콩이는 며칠동안 한두번 물어보고 말았고
아리는 관심도 없었...ㅜㅜ
둘다 인형을 좋아해서 잘 가지고 놀줄 알았는데 시큰둥 하네요
다행히 콩이는 그전보다는 잘 물고 놀지만
아리는 바스락 소리 때문인지 싫어하네요

애착인형이 되었으면 하는 마음으로 구매했지만 아가들은 걍 그런가봐요
reviews.content_en: I live with two long-haired Chihuahuas♡ Kongyi (beige color) has had an attachment toy for 8 years. Since she loves that toy the most, I bought this one hoping to switch it out. The size is smaller than I expected. But it's so cute hehe The ears crinkle and the belly squeaks. Kongyi only chewed on it once or twice over a few days and Ari didn't seem interested at all...ㅜㅜ I thought they both liked plushes and would play with it well but they seem pretty indifferent. At least Kongyi plays with it better than before but Ari doesn't like it, maybe because of the crinkly sound? I bought it hoping it would become an attachment toy but I guess that's just how it is with puppies.

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 진짜 애착인형,, 애기때 다이소에 사준 바스락 인형이 애착인형이였는데 시즌 한정이였는지 너덜해지고 빵꾸나고 버리지도 못하고 5년 가까이 가지고 있었는데 새로운 애착인형을 찾았어요 너무 좋아해요
reviews.content_en: It's a real comfort toy,, When my baby was little, I got a crinkly toy from Daiso that became their comfort toy, but I'm not sure if it was a limited edition—it got all worn out and torn up. I couldn't even throw it away and kept it for almost 5 years. But I found a new comfort toy! My baby loves it so much 💕

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content:
바잇미 패드 사러 왔다가 장난감 이쁜거 왤케 많나요,,? 😭❤️ 
그중에서도 애착인형이 넘 귀여워보여서 구입해봤는데 
애기가 엄청 좋아해요 ☺️☺️ 

귀에서 바스락거리는 부분을 젤 좋아하는 것 같아요 
그래서 금방 망가지려나? 싶었는데 
캔넬에도 숨겨놓고 데리고 다니는 모습에 놀랐어요 😲 

기저귀에 간식 넣을 수 있는 것도 넘 좋더라구요 ㅋㅋ 
돈이 하나도 안아깝고 오히려 더 사고 싶네요,, 
디자인이 너무 귀여워서 저도 애착인형 될 듯 ㅋㅎㅋ,,,
reviews.content_en:
I came in to buy a BITE ME pad, but why are there so many pretty toys?? 😭❤️ I saw the comfort toy among them and it looked so cute that I decided to buy it, and my baby absolutely loves it ☺️☺️ 

It seems like they love the crinkly part in the ears the most. I thought it would break quickly because of that, but I was surprised to see them carrying it around and even hiding it in the kennel 😲 

It's also amazing that you can put treats in the diaper part ㅋㅋ I don't regret spending the money at all—I actually want to buy more,, The design is so cute that I think I'm becoming attached to it too ㅋㅎㅋ,,,

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 와.. 그냥 환장파티🔥 이렇게까지 인형을 좋아한적 처음이예요 ㅠㅠㅠㅠ 그냥 관심보이다가 금방 실증내곤했는데 애착인형 선물해주고싶어서 너무귀엽길래 주문해봤는데 애기가 너무 좋아해요..๑'ٮ'๑ 이렇게까지 좋아할줄은 몰랐는데 자기옆에다두고 수시로 냄시킁킁하고 물고 뜯고~ 인형이 넘 귀여워요ㅠㅠ 토끼랑 강아지랑 고민했는데 강아지가좀더 귀여울거같아서 강아지로주문했는데 실물보고 역시 후회없어요!! 바잇미 장난감 인형은 믿고주문해서 ㅎㅎ 너무귀여운 애착인형 만들어주셔서 감사합니다😬💕
reviews.content_en: Wow.. just absolutely obsessed with it 🔥 This is the first time I've ever loved a toy this much ㅠㅠㅠㅠ They usually show interest for a moment and then lose interest quickly, but I wanted to give them a comfort toy and it looked so adorable so I ordered it, and my baby loves it so much..๑'ٮ'๑ I didn't expect they'd love it this much, but they keep it right next to them and constantly sniff it, bite it, and chew on it~ The toy is so cute ㅠㅠ I was torn between the bunny and the puppy, but I thought the puppy looked a bit cuter so I ordered the puppy, and seeing it in person, I have no regrets!! I trust BITE ME toys to order, so thank you for making such an adorable comfort toy 😬💕

reviews.name: 남****
reviews.content:
우리집 강아지가 너무너무 좋아해요!
처음 집온날부터 애착인형으로 준비해줬던 인형이였는데
그래서그런가 장난감중에서도 이 코끼리인형을 제일 좋아하는것 같아요 ㅋㅋ 강아지가 장난감 가져와~하면 장난감을 가져오는데 그중에서도 코끼리가져와하면 이코끼리만 알고 가져올
정도로 좋아하게됐네요 ㅋㅋ 거의 6개월 가까이 가지고놀다가
너무 잘가지고놀아서 전에있던코끼리가 많이 낡아져서
이번에 또 재구매해서 사줬어요 :)
reviews.content_en:
My dog loves it so much!
I prepared this toy as a comfort toy from the day they first came home, so maybe that's why—among all the toys, they seem to love this elephant toy the most ㅋㅋ When I say "bring a toy," my dog brings me a toy, and when I specifically say "bring the elephant," they know it's just that elephant and bring it ㅋㅋ After playing with it for almost 6 months and loving it so much, the old elephant got really worn out, so I repurchased it again :)

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
신년선물로 뭘 사줄까 하다가 애착인형 너무 귀엽길래 구매했어요 ㅎㅎ 강아지도 넘 귀여웠는데 울애기가 물고댕기기에는 토끼 귀가 딱이라 토끼로 결정했습니다 ㅎㅎ
그런데 애기는 애착인형이라고 생각 안하고 그저 삑삑인형이라 생각하나봐요..하지만 앞으로 여행이나 다른곳에 나갈 때 같이 데리고 나가야겠어요 그런데 저희집 토끼는 귀가 약간 대나무헬리콥터 같네요..?ㅜㅜ 절대 아래로 안쳐져요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 앞으로 잘 댕기고 다닐게요~^^
reviews.content_en:
I was wondering what to get as a New Year's gift, and the comfort toy looked so cute so I bought it ㅎㅎ The puppy was also super cute, but since my baby likes to bite and carry things around, I decided on the bunny because its ears are perfect for that ㅎㅎ
But my baby doesn't think of it as a comfort toy—they just think of it as a squeaky toy.. However, I'll definitely bring it along when we travel or go other places. But our bunny's ears are a bit like a bamboo helicopter..?ㅜㅜ They never fold down ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ I'll keep carrying it around from now on~^^

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 너무 좋아해요 ㅠㅜ 매번 다이소 장난감만 사주다가 이번에 생일이라 많이 주문해봤는데 국내제작 상품이라 안심하고 줄수있을거같아요 강아지들 애착인형으로 딱입니다 사이즈도 딱 좋구 ㅎㅎㅎ 소형견도 충분히 가지고 놀만큼 귀엽고 이뻐요~~~
reviews.content_en: I love it so much ㅠㅜ I used to only buy toys from Daiso, but this time it's their birthday so I ordered quite a bit, and since it's domestically made, I feel comfortable giving it to them. It's perfect as a comfort toy for dogs! The size is just right ㅎㅎㅎ Even small breed dogs can play with it comfortably—it's so cute and pretty~~~

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 너무 좋아해요 ㅠㅜ 매번 다이소 장난감만 사주다가 이번에 생일이라 많이 주문해봤는데 국내제작 상품이라 안심하고 줄수있을거같아요 강아지들 애착인형으로 딱입니다 사이즈도 딱 좋구 ㅎㅎㅎ 소형견도 충분히 가지고 놀만큼 귀엽고 이뻐요
reviews.content_en: I love it so much ㅠㅜ I used to only buy toys from Daiso, but this time it's their birthday so I ordered quite a bit, and since it's domestically made, I feel comfortable giving it to them. It's perfect as a comfort toy for dogs! The size is just right ㅎㅎㅎ Even small breed dogs can play with it comfortably—it's so cute and pretty

reviews.name: 백****
reviews.content: 너무 맘에듭니다 배송도 빠르고 상품도 너무 좋고 가격도 저렴하게 잘 구매했습니다 감사합니다 번창하세여^_^*
reviews.content_en: I'm so happy with it. The shipping was fast, the product is great, and I got it at a good price. Thank you! Wishing you all the best ^_^*

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content:
아 이거보고 얼마나 웃기던짘ㅋㅋㅋㅋ
진짜 토끼인줄 아눈건지 아님 장난치는건지 모르겟는데
토끼인형 던져주면 저렇게 슬금슬금 다가가서 사냥하듯 놀아요 ㅎㅎ
남편이랑 저랑 저거 보는 맛에 삽니다 ㅎㅎㅎㅎ
넘나 귀여워요💕
reviews.content_en: Oh this is so funny ㅋㅋㅋㅋ I'm not sure if they think it's a real rabbit or if they're just playing around, but when I throw the bunny toy at them, they sneak up and "hunt" it like this ㅎㅎ My husband and I buy it just to watch that ㅎㅎㅎㅎ It's so adorable 💕

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content: 애착인형이라길래 너무 귀여워서 사실 제 욕심에 샀어요,, 근데 세상에나 숨길 줄 아는 거라곤 간식밖에 모르던 애가 코끼리를 소중하게 물어와서 자기 집에 숨기기도 하고 코끼리를 베고 자질 읺나 ,, 진짜 애착인형 됐어요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 이런 모습 처음 봐서 너무 신기하고 사실 잘했다란 생각이 들더라구요 ㅠㅠㅠ 진짜 후회 안 해요 ….팬티까지 와방 귀엽습니다 다들 사세요 ㅠ
reviews.content_en: I thought the comfort toy looked so cute so honestly I bought it for myself out of selfishness,, But amazingly, the dog who only knows how to hide treats suddenly brings the elephant back carefully and hides it in their own bed, and sleeps using the elephant as a pillow,, It really became a comfort toy ㅋㅋㅋㅋ This is the first time I've seen them act like this so it's amazing and I genuinely think I made the right choice ㅠㅠㅠ I really have no regrets.... Even the little diaper is super cute. Everyone should buy it ㅠ

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
관심없는 척 하더니
애착인형 당첨ㅎㅎ
너무 귀여워요
삑삑 바스락 소리도 잘 나구요
reviews.content_en: She acted like she didn't care, but it turned out to be her favorite toy 😄 It's so cute! The squeaking and crinkling sounds are great too.

reviews.name: 배****
reviews.content: 애착인형으로 아가인형이라니ㅠㅠ코끼리 넘 귀여워요 종류별로 하나씩 재구매 예정입니다
reviews.content_en: I can't believe it became her favorite toy 😭 The elephant is so adorable! I'm planning to repurchase one of each type.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
ㅠㅠ 장난감이 넘 귀엽게 생겨가지구 주인소장용으로 구매했거등요 ㅍㅎㅎ
재봉선에 털 끼져서 못나보이는거 핀셋이랑 콤 이용해서 털 다 빼주고 얼굴쪽 눈 코쪽 털도 미용가위로 다듬어서 짱귀엽게
만들어줬어용
reviews.content_en: 😭 The toy was so cute that I bought it for myself too haha. There was some fur stuck in the seams that looked messy, so I used tweezers and a comb to pull out all the fur, and trimmed the fur around the eyes and nose with grooming scissors to make it super cute!

reviews.name: 구****
reviews.content:
기존에 무인샵에서 샀던 애착인형..
진짜 우리 아이들의 분풀이 아니 애착인형
이젠 보내줄때가 된것같아 바잇미 제품이란걸 알게되서 구매했답니다...^^  토끼야.. 이제서야 널 보내준다.. 그동안 고생 많아써ㅜㅠ 크흛
reviews.content_en: I bought an attachment toy from an unmanned shop before... It really became my kids' comfort toy and way to vent frustration. Now I think it's time to let it go, so I found out about BITE ME products and bought one 😭 Bunny... finally I'm saying goodbye... You've worked so hard all this time ㅜㅠ

reviews.name: R****
reviews.content: 강아지가 장난감 호불호가 확실해서 안좋아할까봐 걱정했는데 오자마자 토끼랑 맹수놀이도 하고 팬티에 간식 안넣어줘도 잘 가지고 놀아요ㅎㅎ 본인보다 큰 인형은 무서워해서 도망가기바빴는데 이 토끼인형은 딱 한입에 물고다닐수 있어서 만만하게 생각하는지 제가 강아지한테 뽀뽀해줄때마다 토끼인형한테가서 화풀이해요~ 이거코끼리아저씨도 사줘야겠어요
reviews.content_en: I was worried my dog wouldn't like the toy since she has strong preferences, but as soon as she got it, she started playing rabbit and predator games with it, and plays with it well even without treats in it! 😄 She gets scared of toys bigger than herself and runs away, but this bunny toy is just the right size to carry in one bite, so she must think it's manageable—every time I give her a kiss, she goes to the bunny toy to take out her aggression~ I should get her the elephant uncle too!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 너무 귀여워요🤍 삑삑이 바스락 인형 노즈워크 이 한번에 있어서 강아지 취향 파악하려고 구입했는데 아직 아기 강아지라 토끼장난감 사이즈가 큰듯하지만 잘 가지고 놀아요! 이직 노즈워크는 어려워하는데 아주 신난엉덩이가 되어서 너무 귀여워요🤍
reviews.content_en: It's so cute! 🤍 I bought it because it has squeaky, crunchy, and nose work toys all in one to figure out what my dog likes. She's still a puppy so the bunny toy size seems a bit big, but she plays with it well! She's having a hard time with nose work, but she gets so excited with wiggly butt moves, it's adorable! 🤍

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content: 코끼리가 애착인형인데 이젠 정말 코끼리가 보내달라고 외치는 것 같아서 결국은 코끼리 하나 더 샀어요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 인형 뜯자마자 뭔가 딴딴한 ? 솜도 빵빵하게 살아있고 꼬리도 늘어나 있지 않고 … 딱 새 거 티가 나니 강아지가 더 환장하고 좋아하네요 …. 잘 때도 꼬옥 껴안고 자는 코끼린데 여전히 좋아해줘서 다행이에요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: The elephant is her favorite toy, and now it seems like she's literally crying out asking me to send it back, so I ended up buying another elephant 😂😂😂 As soon as I opened the toy, it had this firm quality? The stuffing is nice and puffy, the tail isn't droopy... it looks completely new, so my dog goes absolutely crazy for it... She even hugs it while sleeping, and I'm so glad she still loves it 😄

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 곧 저희 강아지 생일이라 생일파티 해줄때 선물로 주려고 샀어요~ 세개 다 맘에 드는데 일단 토끼 먼저 샀다가 코끼리도 또 구입했어요ㅎㅎ 생일날 줄거라 아직 뜯진 않았는데 상자에 담겨져 있어도 귀여움이 뿜뿜...너무 귀엽네요
reviews.content_en: My dog's birthday is coming up, so I bought this as a birthday party gift~ I like all three, but I bought the bunny first and then the elephant too! I'm saving it for her birthday so I haven't opened it yet, but it's so cute even in the box... it's absolutely adorable!

reviews.name: 홍****
reviews.content:
바잇미 애착 장난감 시리즈 정말 너무 좋아요…
원래 인형을 오래가지고 노는 스타일이 아닌데 이건 정말 한참을 가지고 놀더라구요🤣
이미 전에도 구매했는데 격하게 가지고 놀면서 점점 넝마가 되어가는 인형을 보구 울애기 애착인형 사수하기 위해 더 구매했네요 ㅎㅎ
너무 좋은 나머지 악마표정이 나오는 울애기….😂
reviews.content_en: I really love the BITE ME attachment toy series... She's usually not the type to play with toys for long, but she plays with this one for so long! 😂 I bought it before, but watching her rough-play with it and gradually turn it into rags, I bought more to preserve my baby's favorite toy 😄 She loves it so much she's making a little devil face now 😂

reviews.name: Y****
reviews.content: 배송 빠르고 포장도 잘 하고 받았습니다~ 애기때부터 애착 인형으로 만들어서 이제 이인영에 넣어서 너무 좋아하고 3 번째 재구매했어요
reviews.content_en: Fast shipping and great packaging! I got it~ I made it her favorite toy since she was a baby, and now I put it in her crib and she loves it so much. This is my third repurchase!
